howto.ddrm: DDRM: lcg_decrypt(seed1, raw[0x20:0x40]) 取 seed2; body = lcg_decrypt(seed2, raw[0x54:])
howto.lcg: state=seed; 每步 state=(state*0x3D09)&0xffffffff; k=(state>>16)&0xff; out=in-k (解密)
